title: geum sylvaticum var. atlanticum
intro: Geum sylvaticum var. atlanticum, also known as the Atlantic avens or sea avens, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the western coast of Europe, particularly in the Atlantic regions of the British Isles and France. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Geum sylvaticum var. atlanticum include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in some skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
